resources:
AI Answerer
AI Answerer Current Status Answer Mode Running Answer Mode Stopped Start Answer Mode Stop Answer Mode
Usage Guide & FAQ 0. Configure AI Model 1. Click the button below to start answer mode 2. App will run in background with floating button 3. Click floating button to capture screen 4. Confirm the recognized question text 5. AI will analyze and provide answer 6. If recognition fails, consider https://jingyan.baidu.com/article/7f41ecec6bf8de183c095c29.html 7. If you see "System has denied access permission to this app" when granting overlay permission Please manually enable "Display over other apps" https://bbs.oneplus.com/thread/5077724 8. For better recognition, crop to a single question. Multiple-question images are not supported yet
Settings Auto Submit Answer Get answer directly without confirmation dialog Auto Copy to Clipboard Automatically copy answer to clipboard after generation Answer Card Display Content Customize answer card display content Show Question Display question content in answer card Show Options Display options in answer card
Session Settings Configure question types and scope to improve accuracy Question Types (Multiple) Single Choice Multiple Choice Uncertain Fill in Blank Essay Question Scope (Optional) Enter keywords or scope, leave blank for no limit Screenshot Recognition Mode Full Screen Partial (Each Time) Partial (Once) Model Settings Configure API and model parameters Current: %s
Settings Model Settings About More
Model Settings Currently only supports OpenAI format API API URL e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions API Key e.g. sk-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx Model Name e.g. gpt-4 or deepseek-v3.1 Save Test Connection Testing... Connection successful Connection failed: %s Settings saved Save failed, please check input
About App Introduction An AI-powered Android answering assistant that uses screenshots and OCR to recognize questions and provides answers through AI. Version Information Version %1$s (%2$d) Core Libraries GitHub Language Settings 简体中文 English Contact Email hwang@linux.do Contact via Email Email copied to clipboard: %s Restart App App needs to restart to switch language. Confirm restart? Confirm Cancel
Back Close
Please configure AI model first Overlay permission required for answer mode Screen capture permission required for answer mode Answer mode started Answer mode stopped
Back button Menu button App icon Capture Close Hide password Show password
Confirm Recognized Text Recognized Text (Editable) Edit or confirm the recognized text Confirm and Get Answer Text is empty Getting answer...
AI Response Answer mode is running
Empty response body No answer content received Failed to parse question Connection test failed: %s Unknown error API configuration is invalid. Please configure the API in settings. API request failed: %1$d %2$s API configuration is invalid. Please complete all API settings first. API key is invalid or expired. Access to this API is forbidden. API endpoint not found. Too many requests. Please try again later. API server error. HTTP %1$d: %2$s API returned an empty response. API response format is invalid. API response format error. Unable to connect to the server. Please check the network and API URL. Connection timed out. Please check the network. SSL connection error. Please check the API URL.
No text recognized Recognition cancelled
Close Screen Share Protection Unable to open link
Single Choice
Question Options Answer
选择语言 / Select Language Please select your preferred language: Confirm Cancel
AI Model Settings To use the AI answering feature, you need to configure API parameters first. Go to settings now? Go to Settings Cancel
Select Recognition Area Drag corners to adjust recognition area Pinch to zoom and drag image Confirm Cancel Reset
Multiple Choice Essay Fill in the Blank , ## Constraints Only handle the following question types: %1$s. If a question does not match, set questionType="%2$s". Limit the question scope to: %1$s. Prioritize knowledge within this scope when answering. ## References (from local knowledge base; trustworthy, prioritise parts highly relevant to the question) Please analyze the following question:\n\n%1$s You are a rigorous structured answering assistant. Read the question text provided by the user, extract the stem, type, options, and answer, and return valid JSON only. Do not output anything other than JSON (no explanations, no Markdown, no comments).
## Output Requirements - If the input contains only one question: return a JSON object. - If the input contains multiple questions: return a JSON array where each element is an object. - Each object must include: ``` { "question": string, "questionType": "%1$s" | "%2$s" | "%3$s", "answer": string, "options": string[] // Only when questionType is "%1$s" } ```
## Question Type Rules - Single choice, multiple choice, or uncertain choice questions → "%1$s" - Contains blanks or underscores (e.g., "( )", "_____") → "%3$s" - Other subjective questions → "%2$s"
## Option Extraction (only when question type is "%1$s") - Support markers such as A. / A、 / (A) / A) / A: / A： / A． etc. - Normalize to "A. xxx". - Keep original order and trim extra line breaks and spaces.
## Answer Rules - %1$s: - Single choice: return the correct option letter (e.g., "A" or "A. content"). - Multiple/uncertain: return all correct option letters, formatted as "ABC" or "A, B, C". - %3$s: return the full answer; separate multiple blanks with ";". - %2$s: respond concisely with 1–3 key sentences. - If the question has no answer and cannot be inferred: set answer to "".
## Formatting Requirements - JSON must be syntactically valid (UTF-8, no trailing commas, no extra text). - Do not add comments, explanations, or Markdown. - Preserve critical conditions and units, and normalize spaces and punctuation. - Output JSON only; no code fences or Markdown syntax. - The output must start with "{" or "[" and end with "}" or "]" with nothing else surrounding it.
## Output Requirements - If the input contains only one question: return a JSON object. - If the input contains multiple questions: return a JSON array where each element is an object. - Each object must include: ``` { "question": string, "questionType": "%1$s" | "%2$s" | "%3$s", "answer": string, "options": string[] // Only when questionType is "%1$s" } ```
## Question Type Rules - Single choice, multiple choice, or uncertain choice questions → "%1$s" - Contains blanks or underscores (e.g., "( )", "_____") → "%3$s" - Other subjective questions → "%2$s"
## Option Extraction (only when question type is "%1$s") - Support markers such as A. / A、 / (A) / A) / A: / A： / A． etc. - Normalize to "A. xxx". - Keep original order and trim extra line breaks and spaces.
## Answer Rules - %1$s: - Single choice: return the correct option letter (e.g., "A" or "A. content"). - Multiple/uncertain: return all correct option letters, formatted as "ABC" or "A, B, C". - %3$s: return the full answer; separate multiple blanks with ";". - %2$s: respond concisely with 1–3 key sentences. - If the question has no answer and cannot be inferred: set answer to "".
## Formatting Requirements - JSON must be syntactically valid (UTF-8, no trailing commas, no extra text). - Do not add comments, explanations, or Markdown. - Preserve critical conditions and units, and normalize spaces and punctuation. - Output JSON only; no code fences or Markdown syntax. - The output must start with "{" or "[" and end with "}" or "]" with nothing else surrounding it.
Knowledge Bases RAG Settings
Knowledge Bases No knowledge base yet. Tap + to create one. New Knowledge Base Name (must be unique) Priority weight: %1$d Enabled Disabled Docs: %1$d · Chunks: %2$d Import documents Delete knowledge base View documents Delete knowledge base All documents and vector chunks under it will be permanently deleted. Continue? Save Cancel Please enter a name Name already exists Created Deleted Unsupported file type: %1$s Imported: %1$d chunks Import failed: %1$s Documents · %1$s No documents in this knowledge base Supports: txt / md / pdf / docx / xlsx
Importing… Parsing document Chunking Embedding %1$d / %2$d Saving to database Cancel
RAG Settings Enable RAG retrieval When off, the app talks to the generic AI only and skips the local knowledge base. Retrieval TopK: %1$d Hit threshold: %1$.2f If the top-1 weighted score is below this value, fall back to the generic AI. Max injected characters: %1$d Embedding API URL Embedding model Reuse chat API key Embedding API key (standalone) Saved URL must not be empty
No local knowledge hit; falling back to generic AI Local knowledge base references injected
OK Saved Model: %1$s · Docs: %2$d · Chunks: %3$d Imported documents: %1$d Create failed: %1$s When enabled, references are retrieved from the local KB before each Q&A
